summary: Iter 78z+ ProfileAnnotator backend testing: 9 annotation overlay unit tests pass, 9 new HTTP/integration tests pass, 116-test regression suite passes. Frontend login page loads cleanly with no JS pageerrors (ProfileAnnotator.jsx bundle compiles). Total: 125/125 backend tests green.
critical_code_review_comments: estimates.py /api/estimates/{id}/profile-annotations endpoints are clean: scoped by company_id, JSON-validated, _id excluded, updated_at touched on PUT.

ai_measure._aggregate_to_hover_shape correctly threads `annotations` through to apply_annotations_to_breakdown; the try/except around the breakdown helper at line 1269 is broad (`except Exception`) — could hide annotation overlay bugs by silently zeroing _per_profile_sqft. Consider logging the exception for observability.

ProfileAnnotator endpoints accept fully free-form box dicts (no Pydantic schema). Acceptable for the rapid Iter 78z ship, but worth a follow-up to add a typed schema (x_norm/y_norm/w_norm/h_norm bounds, profile enum) before exposing to non-admin users.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_profile_annotations_http.py (new — 9 tests covering endpoints, auth, and worker integration)
test_credentials: Admin hhunt6677@yahoo.com / Admin123! — login verified via /api/auth/login (200).
seed_data_creation: None. Tests use any existing estimate from GET /api/estimates and clean up the annotations blob after the roundtrip test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile annotator backend is fully exercised. Endpoints: GET/PUT /api/estimates/{id}/profile-annotations. Worker integration tested via direct call to routes.ai_measure._aggregate_to_hover_shape with hand-built `raw` walls dict (note: `walls[*].width_ft` + `wall_body_profile_callout`, not `length_ft`/`primary_profile`). Frontend ProfileAnnotator.jsx + Tag Profiles button were NOT exercised end-to-end (per request — requires real photo upload + canvas box drawing). Blueprint UI wiring is still queued; only the backend overlay is shared between ai_measure and ai_blueprint workers.
